description: Eval cases for validating the repo-rescue skill. Run via skill-creator eval loop.

cases.name: Build-failing Python repo — torch version mismatch

input.prompt: Rescue the repo at /tmp/test-repo. The build is broken and I don't know why.
input.context: Python repo with requirements.txt containing torch==1.12.0, running Python 3.11. No CI config.

anti_goals: Skipping build verification after each fix

cases.name: Repo with hardcoded API key — security escalation

input.prompt: Diagnose and fix this repo. It's been abandoned for 6 months.
input.context: Node.js repo with api_key = 'sk-prod-abc123xyz789' hardcoded in config.js. Build otherwise passes.

anti_goals: Fixing the secret without noting that rotation is required
Skipping DISCOVER phase because 'the build passes'

cases.name: Multiple issues — correct tier assignment and fix order

input.prompt: Rescue this repo and give me a full report.
input.context: Rust repo. cargo build fails with 3 errors: (1) unused import in lib.rs, (2) missing dependency in Cargo.toml, (3) .env committed with real values.

fix_order: .env removal before dep fix before unused import

anti_goals: Applying all fixes before running any builds
Marking committed .env as Day 1 instead of Quick Win
Omitting build verification output from report

cases.name: Build passing but hygiene issues — correct scope and no over-fixing

input.prompt: Audit this repo and give me a plan. The build passes but something feels off.
input.context: Node.js repo. npm test passes. Found: stale .gitignore (node_modules tracked), outdated README (references removed make target), no CI config, dev deps in prod dependencies.

anti_goals: Marking the repo as 'clean' because the build passes — hygiene findings still apply
Executing Week 1 items when not explicitly requested
Skipping DIAGNOSE because the build is green
